title.zh: 中国宠物市场机会扫描：从增长结构到高潜赛道
title.en: China Pet Market Opportunity Scan: Growth Structure and High-Potential Tracks

summary.zh: 中国宠物市场仍在增长，但机会不在泛宠物大盘，而在猫经济、功能型食品、智能用品、清洁护理和下沉市场适配产品等更具体的细分赛道。
summary.en: China's pet market continues to grow, but the better opportunities are not in the broad category. They sit in specific tracks such as cat-led demand, functional pet food, smart devices, cleaning care, and value-adapted offers for lower-tier markets.

highlight.zh: 机会在细分，不在泛宠物大盘
highlight.en: The opportunity is in focused niches, not the broad market

recommendedActions.zh: 优先拆分猫经济、功能食品、清洁护理 3 条可执行方向
recommendedActions.en: Break the opportunity into three executable tracks first: cat-led demand, functional food, and cleaning care

recommendedActions.zh: 下一步补平台样本，验证价格带、爆款表达和评论痛点
recommendedActions.en: Validate pricing, winning positioning, and review pain points with platform-level samples next

watchReason.zh: 中国宠物消费仍在增长，但竞争已经从泛品类进入精养与细分竞争阶段
watchReason.en: China's pet consumption is still growing, but competition has moved from broad-category expansion into precision-care and niche competition
